decision3_substring: the ventilator shall switch to PCV mode (apnea backup ventilation) with respiratory rate RR_AP, inspiratory pressure P_inspAP , and the ratio between inspiratory time and Expiratory time I:E_AP.
output_structured_natural_language: while PSVMode, whenever breathingTime_greaterThanOrEqual_apneaLagTime, within 4 ticks satisfy PCVMode & RR_equalTo_RR_AP & P_insp_equalTo_P_inspAP & ItoE_equalTo_ItoE_AP
